title: bidens cornuta
intro: Bidens cornuta, also known as tickseed or beggar's lice, is a perennial plant species native to North America. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. Bidens cornuta has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in poultices and salves to topical treat skin irritations and minor wounds.
